nasb.text: Yet I will appoint them to keep charge of the house, of all its service and of all that shall be done in it.

esv.text: Yet I will appoint them to keep charge of the temple, to do all its service and all that is to be done in it.

cnv.text: 然而我要委派他們看守聖殿，辦理聖殿的一切事務，作一切當作的工。

ccb.text: 然而，我要委派他们管理圣殿，办理殿中所有的事务。
